perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a vertical montage using a three-way horizontal split-screen format. In the initial phase, the top frame shows a car driving through a highway tunnel, while middle and bottom frames show a child sitting by a sign for Shei-Pa National Park and a woman twirling in a park setting. (2) The second phase transitions to shots of children squatting to look at plants, a man standing by a vending machine, and kids relaxing on a sofa in a modern hotel lobby or living room. (3) The final phase shows the family walking outside with umbrellas, a man feeding a child, and children looking at gashapon machines and a traditional red temple entrance.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A continuous acoustic guitar melody with a medium tempo begins, accompanied by low-frequency road noise and wind from the car footage. (2) The music remains dominant, but soft Mandarin Chinese vocalizations from children and a male adult become audible, suggesting casual conversation. (3) Sound effects of a camera shutter click occur twice in the latter half of the video, synchronized with visual transitions or flash effects, ending with the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: A persistent date stamp reading "2025.9.6 - 2025.9.7" appears in the center of the frame, serving as a temporal anchor for the vlog. (2) Functional Text: On-screen signage displays "雪霸國家公園管理處 SHEI-PA NATIONAL PARK HEADQUARTERS" in a formal, informative tone. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: Small stylized captions appear briefly at the bottom but are mostly obscured by the montage layout.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Travel -> Arrival at Park -> Hotel Stay -> Local Exploration

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult male, 1 adult female, and 2 young boys appearing throughout the montage.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main characters are dressed in casual summer wear; the man wears a white t-shirt and crossbody bag, the woman wears a grey outfit, and the children wear patterned shirts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Features various locations including a highway tunnel, the stone-paved entrance of a national park, a modern hotel room with grey sofas, and a traditional temple with gashapon machines nearby.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight for outdoor scenes and soft, warm interior lighting for hotel scenes.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and share a short family trip to Shei-Pa National Park, using a multi-frame aesthetic to condense two days of memories into a short, nostalgic highlight reel for social media.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product promotions; focus is on personal family memories.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Three-frame horizontal split-screen layout with a central date stamp.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular social media editing trend in East Asia, prioritizing atmosphere and quick visual fragments over a linear spoken narrative.
